urdu transliteration text: ISS PARDE KI KHAATIR MERE BHAYYAA GAYE MAARE
english translation text: My brother was killed for the sake of this veil

urdu transliteration text: ABBAAS KE SHAANE BHI KATE NEHR KANAARE
english translation text: Abbas lost his arms by the banks of the river

urdu transliteration text:
BAAQI NA RAHAA ZAINABE DILGIR KAA PARDAA
Alas, the broken hearted Zainab's veil was not spared
HAMSHIR KAA PARDAA MERI DILGIR KA PARDAA
english translation text: The veil of my sister, the veil of the heartbroken
